selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel metric-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the metric admissibility parent into controller-facing fences for thin metric structure, nonnumeric value tokens, anti-identity and anti-obstruction-collapse rules, anti-classical-metric-law boundaries, and future-layer non-escalation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel math-class follow-on after the metric boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the metric-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: METRIC_IS_THIN_DECLARED_RELATION_STRUCTURE_ONLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's minimal metric schema without importing a full metric-space stack.

candidate_items.name: VALUE_TOKENS_STAY_NONNUMERIC_NONCANONICAL_AND_NONTOTAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-numeric, anti-canonical, and anti-common-scale rule into a controller fence.

candidate_items.name: METRIC_CANNOT_FORCE_IDENTITY_COMMUTATION_OR_OBSTRUCTION_COLLAPSE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps metric subordinate to obstruction, order-sensitivity, and non-identity rules.

candidate_items.name: NO_TRIANGLE_SYMMETRY_REFLEXIVITY_OR_SEPARATION_IMPORT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-classical-metric-law posture into a direct controller fence.

candidate_items.name: METRIC_REQUIRES_SUPPORT_AND_CANNOT_PREAUTHORIZE_FUTURE_LAYERS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps metric assertions dependent on admitted support structure while blocking order, coordinate, dimension, and norm escalation at this layer.

quarantined_items.name: METRIC_LANGUAGE_AS_NUMERIC_DISTANCE_SPACE_OR_MASTER_SCALE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent admits metric vocabulary while explicitly blocking numeric distance-space, canonical zero, total order, and universal common-scale escalation.

quarantined_items.name: METRIC_LANGUAGE_AS_CLASSICAL_LAW_OR_NORM_STACK
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it refuses the usual triangle, symmetry, separation, coordinate, dimension, and norm import path.

notes: This batch was produced as the eighteenth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
